compiled_state.title: Add review event emission to REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add emit-protocol-review-result.sh call to REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md after the Stage 2 review completes and after the Revision Protocol loop resolves. Each call passes --review-type (from caller context), --pass-fail, --revision-cycles.

## TDD Requirement
Exemption criterion 3: prose workflow doc, no conditional logic.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Emit call present in workflow
  Verify: grep -q "emit-protocol-review-result" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Added emit-protocol-review-result.sh calls to REVIEW-PROTOCOL-WORKFLOW.md at two points: (1) post-Stage 2 with --revision-cycles=0, (2) post-Revision Protocol with actual cycle count. Clarified that only one emission occurs per review (immediate pass or post-revision). Acceptance criterion verified via grep.
comments.author: Main
